response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, IT architecture, and open-source technologies, with leadership roles in consulting and project management. His technical breadth (Python, Linux, UML, architecture design) and entrepreneurial background (GISCollective) align well with the job requirements. However, his German language proficiency is only basic (not C1), and his recent roles skew more toward engineering than explicit tech leadership, raising questions about his fit for a Head of Development / Tech Lead position.
strengths: Extensive experience in software architecture, IT leadership, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong technical background across multiple languages (D, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python) and environments (Linux, Kubernetes, Docker)
Proven track record in team mentorship, training (e.g., Selenium course, TDD workshops), and strategic project roles (e.g., re:cinq, Optilyz)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (not meeting the required C1 level)
Limited direct experience with UML and requirements management as a primary responsibility
Recent roles emphasize engineering rather than explicit leadership (e.g., Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq)
